name: Charcoaled Chuck Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle one side of the roast with 2 teaspoons seasoned meat tenderizer.
2. Pierce deeply with a fork and turn over to coat on the other side.
3. Let stand for 30 minutes.
4. In a 2-quart glass baking dish, combine vinegar, olive oil, lemon juice, onion, thyme, and bay leaf.
5. Add the roast and turn to coat evenly.
6. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least six hours or overnight, turning the roast occasionally and spooning marinade over it periodically.
7. Light charcoal in an outdoor grill.
8. Discard the marinade and scrape any onion and herbs off the meat to prevent burning when grilling.
9. Sprinkle the meat with black pepper and place back in the dish.
10. Cover again and microwave on high for 5 minutes.
11. Turn the roast over and microwave on high for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Immediately grill over hot coals for 30 to 40 minutes for medium doneness.
13. Slice the meat diagonally, serving juices with the meat.
14. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
